'''R5-R5''' was an [[R5-series astromech droid|R5-series]] [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] produced by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]]. Owned by the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] trader [[Toba]], R5-R5 helped fly the Gungan's [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], ''[[Sea Killer]]''.

{{Droid-stub}}
